full_description: Improve your productivity with FocusFlow, a powerful app designed to help you stay on track and avoid distractions. The Pomodoro timer allows you to work in focused 25-minute increments, followed by a 5-minute break. The website blocker lets you restrict access to distracting websites and social media during your work sessions. Customizable focus modes enable you to tailor your experience to suit your unique needs and work style. Whether you're a student, professional, or simply looking to boost your productivity, FocusFlow is the perfect tool to help you achieve your goals. Download FocusFlow today and start focusing on what matters most.
